name: Skywrath Mage
description: Even on this fallen field, I dedicate my powers to the lofty Skywrath.

abilities.name: Shield of the Scion
abilities.description: Encloses Dragonus in a magical damage barrier per spell damage instance applied to enemy heroes. The barrier scales correspondingly to Dragonus' current hero level.

abilities.name: Arcane Bolt
abilities.description: Launches a slow-moving bolt to the unit-targeted enemy that deals bonus damage based on current. Launches additional Arcane Bolts upon cast toward other units centered around the unit-targeted enemy, prioritizing heroes.

abilities.name: Concussive Shot
abilities.description: Sets a long range shot that hits the closest hero. Upon impact, the projectile deals damage and slows all affected enemy units within the radius. Launches additional Concussive Shots toward other units centered around the debuff-affected enemy, prioritizing heroes.

abilities.name: Ancient Seal
abilities.description: Reduces the unit-targeted enemy's magic resistance. A holy incantation, whosoever finds themselves touched by Avilliva's sigil must suffer in penitent silence.

abilities.name: Mystic Flare
abilities.description: Deals massive damage that is distributed evenly among all enemy heroes within the radius.
